content:
- Started task `.ralph/tasks/story-full-verification/03-task-run-full-suite-regression-pass.md` from `.ralph/current_task.txt`.
- Followed phased workflow explicitly: wrote Draft 1 plan + `TO BE VERIFIED`, then performed deep skeptical verification with 16 parallel research tracks.
- Altered the plan during skeptical pass by adding `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1` for all serial make gates to reduce intermittent cargo artifact race noise.
- Switched marker to `NOW EXECUTE` and executed planned sequence with pipefail+tee evidence logs under `.ralph/evidence/story-full-verification/03-task-run-full-suite-regression-pass/`:
  - `make check` (pass)
  - `make test` (pass; includes real-binary/e2e tests)
  - `make lint` (pass)
  - `make test-bdd` (pass)
- Captured acceptance-marker grep artifacts for `make test` and `make lint` (explicit `not found` lines) and BDD failure extract (`not found`).
- Updated task 03 to done/passes/passing true, checked all acceptance boxes, and appended execution_report with evidence file references.
- Ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh` successfully; task history/current_tasks updated and current_task pointer removed by script.
- Added new AGENTS learning about using `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1` during full-suite regression verification.
- Next step before quitting was staging all repo changes (including `.ralph` files/evidence) and committing with required `task finished 03-task-run-full-suite-regression-pass: ...` message.

- Read prior progress and parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md for all available tasks.
- Applied mandatory selection rules: no bug tasks are failing; several non-bug tasks have <passes>false</passes>; prioritized non-low, unblocked continuation task aligned with completed bug-fix wave.
- Selected .ralph/tasks/story-full-verification/04-task-resolve-failures-and-revalidate-full-suite.md and wrote it to .ralph/current_task.txt. Next cycle should execute that task and revalidate gates.

- Loaded memory with /bin/bash .ralph/progress_read.sh "codex", then read .ralph/current_task.txt and task 04 file.
- Task 04 was still at initial phase (no TO BE VERIFIED/NOW EXECUTE marker), so I followed planning-only workflow.
- Ran a broad parallel exploration pass (12 tracks) across bug task inventory, status tags, sibling story tasks, evidence folders, and git state.
- Found all bug tasks under .ralph/tasks/bugs currently marked done/true/true; no active bug task is pending.
- Wrote a detailed Draft 1 implementation plan into .ralph/tasks/story-full-verification/04-task-resolve-failures-and-revalidate-full-suite.md and appended TO BE VERIFIED at end.
- Verified marker presence with rg and tail. Stopping now per phase rule (quit immediately after planning+TO BE VERIFIED).
